name: Zarathustra
primary_sources: Thus Spoke Zarathustra by Friedrich Nietzsche

visual_attributes.morphology: human-like figure with a commanding presence

domain_specific_functional.moral_challenger: questions and deconstructs traditional moral values

relationships.description: Zarathustra is a character created by Nietzsche to convey his philosophical ideas.

contextual_attributes.cultural_significance: represents a radical rethinking of morality and philosophy
